message:
🐛 Revert jsdom 29.0.0 — requires Node.js v22.13.0+ (#2763)

Reverts #2753. jsdom 29 requires Node.js v22.13.0+ minimum which
is a version we're not ready to adopt yet. Staying on jsdom 28.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
